section.title: Featured Achievement
section.subtitle: Verified proof of analytical and SQL expertise

project.name: HackerRank SQL — Global Rank #1
project.description: Achieved Global Rank #1 on HackerRank SQL leaderboard by solving advanced SQL challenges involving complex joins, subqueries, window functions, and query optimization under competitive conditions.

media.alt: HackerRank SQL leaderboard showing global rank #1

highlights: Ranked #1 globally in SQL practice leaderboard
Solved advanced SQL problems under time constraints
Demonstrated strong analytical thinking and query optimization skills

impact.problem: Real-world analytics requires precise, efficient, and scalable SQL queries.
impact.solution: Applied advanced SQL concepts to solve complex data problems accurately and efficiently.
impact.outcome: Recognized globally as the top SQL performer, validating strong data analysis capabilities.
